figures.caption: Figure 3 — ROC curves on the held-out Kvasir-Capsule test split (seed=42).
Figure 2 — Qualitative panel of the Monte Carlo physics prior on Kvasir-Capsule Blood-fresh frames.

Table 2 — Per-class one-vs-rest AUC, mean ± SD across six independent seeds (41, 42, 43, 44, 45, 47). EfficientNet-B0 backbone, 30 epochs, 𝑛 = 6,423 test frames, 11 evaluable classes per §3.4. Each entry is the mean of six test-set AUCs (one per seed); the SD reports across-seed dispersion.
